default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Surge AI and GrowthX to discuss website launch, content strategy, upcoming events, and AI Engineer Conference plans.](https://fathom.video/share/LYwpeD5o-JTWzEokms86sFtsvv9jzsox?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website launch targeted for next Monday; final copy adjustments in progress](https://fathom.video/share/LYwpeD5o-JTWzEokms86sFtsvv9jzsox?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Two upcoming events: Happy hour (30-40 guests) and Quint's dinner (invites being sent)](https://fathom.video/share/LYwpeD5o-JTWzEokms86sFtsvv9jzsox?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [AI Engineer Conference: Considering keynote and workshop options for maximum impact](https://fathom.video/share/LYwpeD5o-JTWzEokms86sFtsvv9jzsox?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Content strategy focusing on two pillars: RAN HDI and post-training expertise](https://fathom.video/share/LYwpeD5o-JTWzEokms86sFtsvv9jzsox?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Exploring ways to showcase Surge AI's unique approach and expertise while balancing openness and protecting IP](https://fathom.video/share/LYwpeD5o-JTWzEokms86sFtsvv9jzsox?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)

## Topics

### Website Launch

  - [Target launch date: Next Monday](https://fathom.video/share/LYwpeD5o-JTWzEokms86sFtsvv9jzsox?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Copy adjustments still in progress, but formatting/modules finalized](https://fathom.video/share/LYwpeD5o-JTWzEokms86sFtsvv9jzsox?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Live site performing well, feels smooth](https://fathom.video/share/LYwpeD5o-JTWzEokms86sFtsvv9jzsox?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Minor concern about background pixelation/graininess to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/LYwpeD5o-JTWzEokms86sFtsvv9jzsox?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)

### Upcoming Events

  - [Happy Hour:](https://fathom.video/share/LYwpeD5o-JTWzEokms86sFtsvv9jzsox?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
    
      - [Currently 30-ish high-quality guests, targeting 45 max](https://fathom.video/share/LYwpeD5o-JTWzEokms86sFtsvv9jzsox?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
